Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Arbitration And Commence Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-08-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of: (1) Motion To Stay This Case Pursuant To Civil Procedure Code 1281.4 And (2) Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-14-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT DENNIS FLYNN's Motion To Stay This Case Pursuant To Civil Procedure Code 1281.4 And (2) Motion To Compel Arbitration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. The parties stipulated to stay this action and refer the issue of arbitrability to JAMS. The court adopts the parties' stipulation. All future filings in this action shall be set in department 501 pursuant to SF Local Rule 8.10A1 since the gravamen of this action involves the ownership and management of real property.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
